card.empty.competitions: No competitions yet — create one in about two minutes.
card.empty.divisions: No divisions yet. A division picks the sport, its variant and format — entrants and fixtures live inside it.
confirm.downgrade.title: Downgrade to Community?
confirm.downgrade.body: Pro features become unavailable immediately. Anything over the Community limits is frozen, not deleted.
confirm.downgrade.label: Downgrade
confirm.leaveOrg.title: Leave this organisation?
confirm.leaveOrg.body: You lose access to {name} immediately. An owner can invite you back.
confirm.leaveOrg.label: Leave organisation
confirm.transferOwner.title: Transfer ownership?
confirm.transferOwner.body: You become an admin and cannot undo this yourself — only the new owner can transfer it back.
confirm.transferOwner.label: Transfer ownership
confirm.restoreCheckpoint.title: Restore this save point?
confirm.restoreCheckpoint.body: Schedule edits made after {name} are undone. Results are never touched.
confirm.restoreCheckpoint.label: Restore
confirm.clearSlots.title: Clear unlocked slots?
confirm.clearSlots.body: Every unlocked timetable slot in this division is cleared. Locked slots and results stay.
confirm.clearSlots.label: Clear slots
confirm.deleteClub.title: Delete this club?
confirm.deleteClub.body: {name} is removed. Its teams stay — their badges fall back to no club badge.
confirm.deleteClub.label: Delete club
confirm.withdrawRegistration.title: Withdraw this registration?
confirm.withdrawRegistration.body: The entrant comes off the list and their spot frees up.
confirm.withdrawRegistration.label: Withdraw
confirm.refundRegistration.title: Refund this registration?
confirm.refundRegistration.body: The remaining amount is refunded to the payer.
confirm.refundRegistration.label: Refund
confirm.markPaidRegistration.title: Mark this entry as paid?
confirm.markPaidRegistration.body: Records that you received the fee outside the app (cash or bank transfer) and confirms the entry. This is logged.
confirm.markPaidRegistration.label: Mark paid & confirm
confirm.waiveRegistration.title: Confirm without payment?
confirm.waiveRegistration.body: The entry is confirmed with the fee waived (comped). This is logged.
confirm.waiveRegistration.label: Waive fee & confirm
confirm.withdrawOwnRegistration.title: Withdraw your registration?
confirm.withdrawOwnRegistration.body: This frees your spot. You can register again while registration is open.
confirm.withdrawOwnRegistration.label: Withdraw
confirm.revokeKey.title: Revoke this API key?
confirm.revokeKey.body: Integrations using {name} stop working immediately. This cannot be undone.
confirm.revokeKey.label: Revoke key
confirm.deleteStage.title: Delete this stage?
confirm.deleteStage.body: {name} and its fixtures are removed. Completed results in other stages stay.
confirm.deleteStage.label: Delete stage
visibility.private.label: Private
visibility.private.consequence: Only your team can see it.
visibility.unlisted.label: Link only
visibility.unlisted.consequence: Anyone with the link can view. Hidden from Google and our directory.
visibility.public.label: Public
visibility.public.consequence: Anyone can find it — Google, and the Seazn discover page.
visibility.share.label: Share link
visibility.youth.title: This competition includes youth divisions
visibility.youth.body: Making it visible publishes players' names on the public page. Confirm you hold guardian consent for every under-age player before continuing.
confirm.withdrawEntrant.title: Withdraw {name}?
confirm.withdrawEntrant.body: In a running table stage: if they've played less than half their games, everything they played is voided (standings read as if they never entered); otherwise their results stand and remaining games walk over to opponents. In a bracket, opponents advance. This settles matches through the normal scoring ledger, so each one can be undone.
confirm.withdrawEntrant.label: Withdraw entrant
confirm.shiftAll.title: Shift every fixture by {minutes} minutes?
confirm.shiftAll.body: Locked and decided fixtures stay put. If the shift lands anything in a conflict, the board flags it — you can fix those matches individually, or undo the whole shift from the history panel.
confirm.shiftAll.label: Shift everything
board.stale: Schedule changed by someone else — board refreshed.
schedule.tz.caption: Times shown in {tz}
schedule.unscheduled.title: Not scheduled yet
register.full.title: This division is full
register.closed.title: Registration is closed
register.payments.unavailable.title: Card payments are temporarily unavailable
register.payments.unavailable.body: Try again shortly, or contact the organiser.
register.waitlist.noPayment: Full — join the waitlist, pay only if promoted.
register.ticket.title: You're registered
register.ticket.keep: Keep this reference — it's how you check your status and how the organiser finds you on the day.
register.guardian.title: Under-18 entry — guardian consent
register.consent.data: I agree that {org} and Seazn Club will store and process the details on this form (name, email address, date of birth) to run this competition.
showcase.label: Showcase on seazn.club
showcase.consent: By turning this on, this competition's name, your organisation's name, its sport(s), dates, location (if given), live scores and standings may appear on seazn.club's home, discovery and sport pages, and in marketing/social material. Requires public visibility — it switches off automatically if visibility drops. You can opt out any time; past marketing use is permitted, no new use after opt-out.
showcase.needsPublic: Set visibility to public to enable showcasing.
apiKeys.scope.read.label: Read
apiKeys.scope.read.line: Fetch competitions, fixtures, standings and registrations. Can't change anything.
apiKeys.scope.score.label: Score
apiKeys.scope.score.line: Everything Read does, plus push live scores and start divisions — for scoreboard integrations.
apiKeys.scope.manage.label: Manage
apiKeys.scope.manage.line: Full access: create competitions, generate fixtures, moderate registrations. Treat like a password.
apiKeys.pin.label: Limit to one competition
apiKeys.pin.line: A limited key only works inside the chosen competition — hand it to a vendor without exposing the rest.
apiKeys.manage.nudge: This key has full access — consider replacing it with a narrower one.
embed.title: Embed on your website
embed.line: Paste this snippet into your club site — it stays in sync by itself.
sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.line: Sponsor logos appear on your public pages, the registration page and the TV slideshow.
claim.invite.tip: Email this player a link to take over their profile — see their matches, RSVP availability, manage their own consent.
claim.invite.title: Invite {name} to claim their profile
claim.invite.explain: They get an email with a claim link — only an account signed in with that address can accept it. Claiming lets them see their matches, RSVP availability and manage what's public.
claim.invite.sendFailed: The email couldn't be sent — copy the link below and share it with them yourself.
claim.invite.linkNote: The link works for 14 days and is only shown here once. Whoever opens it must sign in as the invited address.
claim.revoke.tip: Cancel the pending invite — the emailed link stops working immediately.
claim.unlink.tip: Disconnect the player's account from this profile. Rosters and results stay; you can invite them again later.
persons.merge.tip: Fold a duplicate entry into the player you keep. Can't be undone.
confirm.unlinkPlayer.title: Unlink this player account?
confirm.unlinkPlayer.body: {name} loses access to this profile on their player home. Matches and results stay. You can invite them to claim again later.
confirm.unlinkPlayer.label: Unlink
me.title: My matches & teams
me.claimed: Profile claimed — this is your player home now.
me.empty: Nothing here yet. When an organiser rosters you into a team or draw, your matches land on this page.
me.next.title: Next match
me.upcoming.title: Coming up
me.results.title: Recent results
me.teams.title: My teams
me.rsvp.notePlaceholder: Add a note for the organiser (optional)
me.consent.title: What's public about you
me.consent.line: These switches control whether your name and photo appear on public pages — per club.
me.consent.name: Show my name publicly
me.consent.locked: An organiser manages this until you're 16.
checkin.title: Match check-in
checkin.done.title: You're checked in
checkin.done.line: The organiser can see you're here. Good luck!
checkin.needsClaim.title: Claim your profile first
checkin.needsClaim.line: Check-in works once you've claimed your player profile. Ask the organiser to send you a claim invite, then scan again.
org.home.title: Competitions
org.home.subtitle.editor: A competition holds one or more divisions — each with its own sport, entrants and format.
org.home.subtitle.viewer: You have view-only access to this board.
aria.viewPublicNewTab: View Public Page (opens in a new tab)
aria.qrPoster: QR poster (PDF, opens in a new tab)
div.detail.standings.empty: No table stages in this division — standings apply to league, group and swiss stages.
div.detail.tiebreak.label: Tie-break cascade:
div.detail.embed.private: This competition is private, so there is nothing to embed. Set it to unlisted or public in competition settings first.
comp.settings.title: Settings — {name}
comp.schedule.title: Competition schedule — {name}
comp.schedule.empty: No divisions yet — the schedule board fills in once this competition has divisions with fixtures.
payments.title: Payments
payments.desc: How your entry fees are collected — card payments via Stripe, or your own cash / bank-transfer instructions. Each division picks its method in its registration settings.
settings.nav.title: Settings
settings.api.noAccess: Only owners and admins can manage API keys.
settings.emailChange.expired: This confirmation link has expired. Please request a new one.
settings.emailChange.taken: That email address is already in use by another account.
settings.emailChange.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
settings.account.exportDesc: Download a copy of your profile, organizations, and tournaments.
settings.account.privacyDesc: Change or withdraw your consent for PostHog product analytics. See our
settings.account.soleOwner: Sole owner — invite others before you can transfer or leave.
settings.account.deleteDesc: Deleting your account removes you from all organizations and schedules your data for permanent erasure within 30 days.
billing.title: Plan & Billing
billing.checkoutComplete: Checkout complete — your plan is now
billing.credit: {amount} account credit — pays future invoices automatically.
billing.cardOnFile: Card on file — Pro continues after the trial.
billing.paymentFailed: Your last payment failed. Fix the card below, then retry.
billing.trialCopy.available: 14-day free trial · no card required · cancel anytime
billing.trialCopy.used: Billed from day one — your free trial has already been used · cancel anytime
upgrade.includes.formats: Advanced formats — double elimination, ladders, americano
upgrade.includes.fees: Online entry fees via Stripe (5% platform fee)
upgrade.includes.branding: Custom branding, PDF/XLSX exports, realtime slideshow
upgrade.title: Upgrade “{name}”
upgrade.active.title: Event Pass active ✓
upgrade.active.body: This competition is upgraded for its lifetime — divisions, entrants, formats, fees, branding and exports are all unlocked here.
upgrade.pro.title: You’re on Pro
upgrade.pro.body: Pro already covers everything an Event Pass adds — across every competition in your organization.
upgrade.intro: One payment upgrades this competition for its lifetime — no subscription, and it survives forever even if you never go Pro.
upgrade.ownerOnly: Only the organization owner can purchase upgrades.
upgrade.proCard.title: Running events all year?
upgrade.proCard.body: Pro upgrades every competition in your organization — unlimited events and divisions, 256 entrants per division, player stats, officials, API access and a 2% platform fee.
me.growth.q: Run your own league or tournament?
checkin.subtitle: Tell the organiser you’ve arrived — one tap.
checkin.signInPrompt: Sign in to check in — no password needed.
register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Pick a division, fill in your details — takes under a minute.
register.notOpen: Registration is not open for this competition.
status.pending.title: Registration received
status.pending.body: Your spot is held. If an entry fee is due, settle it below and the organiser confirms your entry.
status.pending_card.title: Almost in — payment confirms your spot
status.pending_card.body: Your spot is held until the deadline below. Pay by card and you’re confirmed instantly.
status.paid.title: Payment received
status.paid.body: Your payment is in — confirmation is being finalised.
status.confirmed.title: You’re in!
status.confirmed.body: Your registration is confirmed and you’re on the entrant list.
status.waitlisted.title: You’re on the waitlist
status.waitlisted.body: The division is full — no payment is taken while you wait. If a spot opens you’re promoted automatically; keep this page’s link.
status.withdrawn.title: Registration withdrawn
status.expired.title: Pay window passed
status.expired.body: This registration expired unpaid and the spot was released. If places remain you can register again.
status.waitlistPosition: You’re #{n} in line — we’ll email you if a spot opens.
status.howToPay: How to pay your entry fee
status.contactYou: The organiser will contact you at your registered email with payment details.
status.confirmsOnce: The organiser confirms your entry once the payment arrives.
status.cardUnavailable: Card payments are temporarily unavailable — try again shortly or contact the organiser.
status.keepLink: Keep this page’s link — it’s your receipt and the only way to manage this registration.
ref.line.paid: Payment received — confirmation is being finalised.
ref.line.waitlisted: On the waitlist — promoted automatically if a spot opens.
ref.line.expired: The pay window passed — this registration expired. Register again if spots remain.
ref.shareText: I’m registered for {division} at {competition} (ref {ref}). Follow it live:
register.ticket.legacyRef: Issued before reference numbers — your email link is your receipt.
